title: The Big Picture: On our radar for 2021
section_path: The Big Picture: On our radar for 2021
section_path_text: The Big Picture: On our radar for 2021
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
Red-hot iron ore market
Iron ore made headlines last year as prices rocketed by 75% to nine-year highs. Disappointing output from Brazil, combined with strong demand and a stock rebuild in China helped to squeeze the seaborne market. December's rally also appears to have been driven by heightened speculation on Chinese futures contracts, prompting authorities to place restrictions on trading volumes.
